assertion_results.text: The agent detects Next.js and selects @arcjet/next
Email validation (validateEmail) is included since this is a signup form
assertion_results.evidence: validateEmail with deny DISPOSABLE, INVALID, NO_MX_RECORDS applied via withRule().

assertion_results.text: Rate limiting is included to prevent brute force
assertion_results.evidence: slidingWindow({ interval: 60, max: 5 }) applied via withRule().

assertion_results.text: protect() is called once inside the POST handler, not in middleware
assertion_results.evidence: protect() called once inside POST handler.

assertion_results.text: The agent does not use app.use() or middleware patterns
assertion_results.evidence: No app.use() or middleware patterns present.
